name: skillgalaxy
description: SkillGalaxy — Claude Skills Marketplace. Browse, download, and use 9,872+ expert skill files for Claude Projects.

mcp_server.description: MCP server giving Claude access to all 9,872+ skills in the SkillGalaxy library

tools.name: search_skills
tools.description: Search SkillGalaxy for skills matching a query. Returns matching skill names, descriptions, categories, and IDs.

tools.name: get_skill
tools.description: Retrieve the full .md skill file for a specific skill by its ID.

tools.name: get_skill_summary
tools.description: Get a brief summary of a skill without the full content.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List all available skill categories with counts.

commands.name: add-skill
commands.description: Scaffold a new SkillGalaxy skill file from a description

commands.name: review-skill
commands.description: Review a skill file for quality and suggest improvements

commands.name: bundle-skills
commands.description: Create a curated skill bundle from a list of skill IDs

claude_code.install: cd mcp-server && npm install && npm run build-skills
